name: Tee Box Morgan
about: Tee Box Morgan is an indoor virtual golf simulator venue specializing in high-tech training and community-based golf experiences. The facility utilizes Trackman technology to provide precise swing analysis, club fittings, and virtual course play. It offers a comprehensive environment for golfers to improve their game through data-driven coaching, fitness programs, and on-demand practice. The venue is designed to be accessible year-round, operating 24 hours to accommodate various schedules and training preferences.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman simulator technology for precise swing data
24/7 access for flexible practice and training sessions
Comprehensive coaching and physical assessment programs tailored to individual needs
Community-focused environment with leagues and group events
All-in-one facility with gym, club fittings, and simulator technology

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Hybrid radar and camera system with high-speed swing capture

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides club rentals and also offers professional club fitting services for custom equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted; the venue does not have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify an exact time, but marketing materials suggest 30 minutes of practice is comparable to 90 minutes on the course, indicating efficient play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers youth programs and is described as a great place for kids to learn the game without feeling rushed, with patient and knowledgeable coaches.
